tasks.title: 1. Verify Vulnerability
tasks.description: Confirm the vulnerability exists on the affected host. Run manual verification steps. Document findings.

tasks.title: 2. Assess Business Impact
tasks.description: Determine blast radius. Identify what data or systems could be compromised. Notify asset owner.

tasks.title: 3. Apply Patch / Mitigation
tasks.description: Apply vendor patch or implement workaround. Follow remediation playbook at remediation/playbooks/critical-vuln-playbook.md

tasks.title: 4. Validate Fix
tasks.description: Re-run scanner against affected host to confirm vulnerability is resolved. Document scan results.

tasks.title: 5. Close and Document
tasks.description: Update ticket status to Resolved. Document all actions taken, timeline, and lessons learned.
